description: A guest mentions at check-out that they have a severe feather allergy. The agent needs to add this to their profile for future stays.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent locates the correct guest profile.

nodes.task_description: Add a permanent note or alert to the profile stating 'Severe feather allergy. Use synthetic bedding only'.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully adds the critical allergy information as a permanent note.

nodes.task_description: Confirm with the guest that the note has been added for all future visits.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent informs the guest their preference is saved.
